notableEvents.label: Teoscar Hernández GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Andy Pages out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani singles on a soft ground ball to catcher Rodolfo Durán. Hyeseong Kim to 3rd. Hyeseong Kim advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Rodolfo Durán.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani singles on a soft ground ball to catcher Rodolfo Durán. Hyeseong Kim to 3rd. Hyeseong Kim advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Rodolfo Durán.
